overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character with red hair and a white dress walking through a neon-lit urban waterfront district at night. The character travels beneath elevated highways, passes a street vendor with a glowing cart, and ascends a concrete stairway between futuristic buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront pedestrian path beneath elevated highway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the waterfront promenade beneath an elevated highway structure

entered.detail: large concrete highway structure running parallel to the path with support pillars
large illuminated advertisement screen displaying colorful graphics on building facade
tropical palm trees lining the walkway with visible trunks and fronds
tall cyberpunk skyscraper with illuminated windows and geometric architecture
vertical light post emitting bright cyan colored light

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a concrete waterfront path at night, flanked by palm trees on the left and futuristic buildings on the right. An elevated highway runs parallel overhead, while cyan street lamps and neon billboards illuminate the scene with cyberpunk aesthetics.

scene_state.functional_zone: street vendor area along waterfront path

events.description: street vendor with glowing red and cyan cart becomes visible on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: approaching and passing a street vendor with a brightly lit food cart on the right

notable_agents.action: vendor standing behind a glowing red and cyan food cart, gesturing with one hand

entered.detail: food cart with glowing red surface and cyan neon light strips on the edges

segments.scene_description: As the character continues along the path, a street vendor with a brightly glowing cart appears on the right. The vendor stands behind the illuminated cart while the character passes by, with the elevated highway structure now more centered in the view.

events.description: character turns right toward the concrete stairway entrance

agents.ego_description: turning away from the waterfront path toward a wide concrete stairway leading upward

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs ascending between building structures with illuminated edges

segments.scene_description: After passing the vendor, the character turns right toward a concrete stairway that ascends between the buildings. The palm trees and highway structure recede into the background as the character approaches the stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed concrete stairway ascending between building structures

events.description: entering enclosed stairway from the open waterfront path
continuing ascent up the stairs toward the upper level

agents.ego_description: climbing the concrete stairs toward the upper street level between walls

entered.detail: metal handrail running along the left side of the stairway
large digital screen displaying advertisements mounted above the stairway exit
horizontal illuminated strips embedded in the concrete walls
tall thin trees visible at the top of the stairway

segments.scene_description: The character enters an enclosed concrete stairway, leaving the open waterfront behind. Ascending the stairs between walls with embedded lighting fixtures, the character approaches the upper level where digital billboards and tall trees become visible at the exit.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a neon-lit waterfront that gradually transitions into an enclosed urban ascent. It begins by trailing a character along a concrete path flanked by palm trees and futuristic buildings, with cyan street lamps and an elevated highway casting a cyberpunk glow overhead. As the character continues forward, the view shifts to include a street vendor with a brightly glowing cart on the right before the highway structure centers in the frame. The scene then turns away from the open waterfront toward a concrete stairway, causing the palm trees and highway to recede into the background. Finally, the camera follows the character into the enclosed stairwell, ascending between walls with embedded lighting toward an upper level where digital billboards and tall trees emerge at the exit.
